actionlint.notes: Both workflows lint clean after CI-01 matrix expansion. Re-run command: `actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/contract-weekly.yml` (binary at $USERPROFILE/.copilot/bin/actionlint.exe).

blocker.reason: Tentacle is forbidden from running `git commit` / `git push`; the CI workflow's new `workflow_dispatch:` trigger and new matrix jobs only become available on the default branch (or any pushed branch) once the orchestrator merges this PR. From the local working tree, `gh workflow run ci.yml` against `main` would dispatch the OLD workflow definition without the new matrix jobs, so it is not a valid dry-run for the new gates.
blocker.unblocks_on: Orchestrator pushes the tentacle branch (or merges the PR) so the updated ci.yml exists on a ref that `workflow_dispatch` can target.

next_steps: Orchestrator pushes the tentacle branch w1-t0-461-ci-matrix.

Orchestrator (or reviewer) runs: `gh workflow run ci.yml --repo magicpro97/tui-translator --ref w1-t0-461-ci-matrix` and then `gh run list --workflow=ci.yml --branch=w1-t0-461-ci-matrix --limit=1 --json databaseId,url,conclusion`.
Record `run_id`, `run_url`, `triggered_at`, `triggered_by`, and final `conclusion` in this file (status flips to `pass` once at least one successful run URL is present).
